assertions.title: Stablecoins return real market prices from actual oracles

steps.action: Attempt runtime get_price() call for USDC at block 18_000_000
steps.expected: PriceResult with source != 'stable usd' and price in 0.90-1.10
steps.observed: Runtime call fails with pre-existing dank_mids 'has_pending_calls' AttributeError — same as existing skipped tests

steps.action: Static code analysis: grep for 'stable usd' bucket in magic.py
steps.observed: No matches found — the 'elif bucket == "stable usd": price = UsdPrice(1)' branch is gone; only 'mstable feeder pool' bucket remains

steps.action: Static code analysis: grep for 'stable usd' or 'stable_usd' across all of y/
steps.expected: No matches anywhere in pricing code
steps.observed: Zero matches across entire y/ directory — the stable usd concept is completely removed from pricing

steps.expected: Test checks source != 'stable usd' and price in tolerance range
steps.observed: test_price_result.py lines 272-279: asserts 0.90 <= float(result.price) <= 1.10 AND 'stable' not in result.path[0].source.lower(). Test would execute if dank_mids issue were resolved.

assertions.evidence: Static analysis confirms: (1) 'stable usd' bucket completely removed from y/prices/magic.py — grep returns no matches; (2) no 'stable usd' or 'stable_usd' anywhere in y/ codebase; (3) code now falls through to real oracle/DEX pricing. Runtime verification blocked by pre-existing dank_mids 'has_pending_calls' issue (also affects test_stablecoin_returns_price_result which is skipped). The code change is sound: stablecoins now route through the same pricing pipeline as all other tokens.
assertions.details: The runtime test test_stablecoin_returns_price_result is correctly written to verify this behavior but is skipped due to pre-existing dank_mids infrastructure issue. This is a known pre-existing issue per AGENTS.md: 'dank_mids attribute errors (has_pending_calls) are pre-existing'.

assertions.title: DEX routing using STABLECOINS still works

steps.action: Verify STABLECOINS constant exists in y/constants.py
steps.expected: STABLECOINS dict mapping still present with stablecoin addresses
steps.observed: _STABLECOINS and STABLECOINS Final dicts present with full mapping (USDC, TUSD, DAI, USDT, sUSD for mainnet)

steps.action: Verify STABLECOINS used in DEX routing (v2.py) without hardcoded return
steps.expected: STABLECOINS referenced in path-finding and pool-selection logic only
steps.observed: 7+ references in v2.py: token_out in STABLECOINS (path finding), token_address in STABLECOINS (deepest_stable_pool delegation), paired_with in STABLECOINS (pool filtering), paired_against in STABLECOINS (path construction). No 'return 1' pattern found.

assertions.evidence: STABLECOINS constant in y/constants.py is unchanged. All routing uses in y/prices/dex/uniswap/v2.py (7+ references) use STABLECOINS for path finding and pool selection logic only — zero instances of 'return 1' or hardcoded price returns near STABLECOINS. The routing behavior is preserved exactly as specified.
assertions.details: Grep confirms: STABLECOINS used at lines for path selection (token_out in STABLECOINS), pool depth (deepest_stable_pool), and path construction (paired_against in STABLECOINS). All are routing decisions, not price returns.

assertions.title: Test suite passes without new failures

steps.observed: 1 passed (test_routing_tokens_shape), 5 skipped with reason 'Pre-existing dank_mids issue: has_pending_calls attribute missing'. Exit code 0.
19 passed, 7 skipped (skipped due to not ON_MAINNET or pre-existing dank_mids issue). Exit code 0. No failures.

assertions.evidence: test_constants.py: 1 passed, 5 skipped, exit 0. test_price_result.py: 19 passed, 7 skipped, exit 0. Zero new test failures. Skips are all pre-existing infrastructure issues (dank_mids has_pending_calls, brownie not connected at module import time).
assertions.details: Full pytest output confirmed no FAILED tests in either file. All 19 passing tests in test_price_result.py cover PriceStep, PriceResult construction, truthiness, float conversion, repr behavior, and import paths.

frictions: dank_mids 'has_pending_calls' AttributeError prevents live blockchain calls — pre-existing infrastructure issue that affects stablecoin integration tests
brownie not connected at module import time causes ON_MAINNET=False, skipping mainnet-requiring tests in test_price_result.py
summary: Tested 3 assertions. VAL-PRICE-001: passed via static analysis (live test blocked by pre-existing dank_mids issue). VAL-ROUTE-001: passed (STABLECOINS routing preserved, no hardcoded returns). VAL-TEST-002: passed (1+19 tests pass, skips are all pre-existing).
